column1: Honeywell Automation India Limited (HAIL)was started in the year 1987 as a JV between Tata and Honeywell. It was known as Tata Honeywell Limited each holding 39.54% stake. Later in 2004 Honeywell Asia Pacific Inc. bought Tata's stake and the name was changed to Honeywell Automation India Limited. [1] HAIL is engaged primarily in the business of Automation & Control systems on turnkey basis and others. [2]
